title: BEL Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: BEL Ventures Solutions is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
BEL Ventures Solutions, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About BEL Ventures Solutions:
BEL Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BEL Ventures Solutions!
